title: CCTV Captures Bengaluru Horror: 27-Year-Old Man Brutally Stabbed Multiple Times In Early Morning Attack; 2 Detained
description: A 27-year-old man was brutally murdered in Bengaluru’s Ramamurthy Nagar in an early morning incident, triggering panic in the area. Police have launched an investigation into the Bengaluru murder case as details of the attack emerge.
